name: Microsoft
headline: Microsoft CARRY-FORWARD CONFIRMATION at 65.3 / Established — rotation backfill cycle. Two May 18 contextual signals: (1) Musk v. Altman verdict (May 18) materially positive for Microsoft — 27% stake in OpenAI secure, no forced restructuring, named-defendant cleared on statute-of-limitations grounds; (2) Microsoft renegotiated OpenAI deal: $38B revenue-share cap through 2030, Azure exclusivity dropped — reduces single-counterparty concentration. Concurrent: 92,000+ tech workers laid off in 2026 industry-wide; Microsoft's Rule of 70 buyout program (8,500+ workers, first in 51-year history) in pre-execution window. No new entity-specific Microsoft event in May 18 scan window above carry-forward baseline. Confirm at 65.3.

EMP.rationale: Sustained. Rule of 70 buyout program (8,500+ workers) in pre-execution window; severance-package quality vs scale-of-displacement question pending.

BND.rationale: Sustained. OpenAI deal renegotiation reduces single-counterparty concentration (modest BND-positive signal but sub-threshold for dimensional change).

ACC.rationale: Sustained. Musk v. Altman verdict cleared Microsoft as named defendant on procedural grounds; no new accountability event.

evidence.summary: May 18: Musk v. Altman verdict cleared Microsoft as named defendant (statute-of-limitations grounds). 27% OpenAI stake secure; no forced restructuring.
May 1: Microsoft renegotiated OpenAI deal — $38B revenue-share cap through 2030, Azure exclusivity dropped. Reduces single-counterparty concentration.
April 2026: Microsoft Rule of 70 buyout program — 8,500+ workers, first in 51-year history. Pre-execution window.

keyEvidence: Musk v. Altman verdict (May 18) cleared Microsoft as named defendant — positive but procedural.
OpenAI deal renegotiated: $38B revenue-share cap, Azure exclusivity dropped.
Rule of 70 buyout program (8,500+ workers) in pre-execution window.
92,000+ tech workers laid off industry-wide in 2026.
rationale: Rotation backfill confirmation. No new entity-specific event above carry-forward baseline. Math: (4+3.2+3.9+3.2+3.8+3.8+4+3)/8 = 28.9/8 = 3.6125 → ((3.6125-1)/4)*100 = 65.31 → 65.3.
watches: Rule of 70 buyout program execution (severance-package quality, geographic distribution)
EU AI Act August 2 obligations (high-risk AI)
boundaryWatchResolution: Not a boundary case. 65.3 sits 5.3pt above Established floor (60/61) and 15.7pt below Exemplary floor (81).
disclaimer: This assessment is based on publicly available information and does not constitute a formal Compassion Benchmark Certified Assessment.
